name: Wand of the Spider (2nd-Rank Spell)
description:
The length of this wand is a pair of twisted giant spider legs.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast at 2nd-rank, but the strands of webbing are toxic. Any creature that fails its Athletics check or Reflex save to navigate the web takes ] damage.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of web at 2nd-rank.
